case_number: constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-792 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution. 07.11.2016. None present for the petitioner. = From the record it appears that after obtaining favourable order on 30.09.2016, the petitioner side is not proceeding with the matter nor has complied with the office note for payment of cost and providing copies of petition to the branch. On the last date of hearing one week time was granted to the petitioner only as an indulgence to comply with the office note. Today, the matter has been called twice and now it is 11:15 a.m. neither the petitioner nor his Counsel is in attendance. Consequently, instant constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Shahid
